description: Small non-smoke direction-aware pilot dataset for server execution only. Covers supported named modes and narrow named-mode-centered spread without raw-angle primary data.

sampling_policy.description: Small non-smoke pilot covering supported named in-plane modes with a narrow-spread subset around those modes.

diagnostic_only_regime.generic_raw_angles: explicit opt-in only; excluded from primary pilot

transport_controls.nk: fixed moderate odd grid for pilot
